goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the type of hotel. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4. If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the cheap price range. Make sure you get postcode. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre. Make sure you get postcode, phone number, and attraction type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm looking for some moderately priced accommodations for my visit. Can you help me with that?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Absolutely! Is there a specific area of town you're interested in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, but I'd like to stay in a 4 star hotel that offers free parking.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have nine moderately priced, 4 star guesthouses with free parking. Does location matter?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, but are there any that are less expensive?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes there are 8 cheap guesthouses that have both free parking and internet. Would you like me to book you one of those?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, I actually prefer a hotel rather than a guest house. Are there any moderately priced 4 star hotels?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: All the hotels are booked.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Are there any cheap hotels?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I found the cambridge belfry lcoated at back lane, cambourne.  Would you like me to book you there?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That sounds fine, I just need the postcode though.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The postcode for The Cambridge Belfry is cb236bw.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you, can you also tell me about places to go in the centre?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, what are you interested in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Anything is fine as long as it is in the centre.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm not sure what I need to get you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: How about a college to visit?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The centre is filled with colleges, 13 in total. I recommend emmauel college located on Saint Andrew's Street it is free to visit.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great! Can you get me their phone number and postcode?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Postal code is cb23ap, phone number is 01223334200, any other questions today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That is all I need. Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for calling.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the centre and doesn't need to include internet. The hotel should include free parking. If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi. Make sure you get star of the hotel. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel and should be in the type of museum. Make sure you get entrance fee, phone number, and address

turns.utterance: They have a 3 Star rating

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called lynne strover gallery. Make sure you get attraction type, phone number, and entrance fee. You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called avalon. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 3 nights starting from monday. Make sure you get the reference number

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east and should be in the type of boat. Make sure you get address, postcode, and phone number. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 0 and should be in the type of hotel. The hotel should include free parking. If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4. Make sure you get whether they have internet

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south and should be in the type of museum. Make sure you get address. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should be in the same area as the attraction. The hotel should have a star of 3. If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the expensive price range. Make sure you get phone number and hotel type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you find me a museum to visit?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure. What of part town do you prefer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Are there any museums in the North part of town?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Nothing in the north, sorry.  The closest would be Broughton House Gallery in the Centre at 98 King Street, cv11ln.  Is that too far?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm sorry, I'm not sure why I previously said the north part of town. I meant a museum in the Southern part.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There is the byard art museum located in the south. Are you interested?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, that sounds lovely. Can you give me their address, please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Certainly. Byard Art is located at 14 king's parade and their postcode is cb21sj. Can I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would also like a 3 star hotel please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have one 3 star hotel, the lensfield hotel, in the southern part of town. It is expensive.
